name: Detroit Steel
overview: The Motor City, once the Mecca of American auto manufacturing, is making a comeback and classic car builder Adam Genei's leading the charge. Born and bred in Detroit, Adam and his team at Mobsteel turn worn out, rundown rides into full throttle, high-end masterpieces.

trailers.title: Detroit Steel: Living The High Octane Dream | Premieres January 28 at 10/9c | History
